creator: yamagi@yamagi.org
text:
Created attachment 171295
svn patch with the update

This is another bugfix update. Changes to the application:

* Fixed crash in tint2conf when adding background
* Fixed crash in systray with non-Latin languagess
* Battery: do not show negative durations when the sensors return garbage

Changes to the port:

* Bump version
* Add missing dependencies

The update was tested on FreeBSD 10.3, 10.2, 10.1 and 9.3 with Poudriere.
